title: Assurance Package (AP) Cash
text:
Assurance Package (AP) Cash - SupportGoWhere
Assurance Package (AP) Cash
Share link
$700 to $2,250 cash payouts over 5 years from 2022 to 2026 for adult Singapore Citizens aged 21 and above, residing in Singapore, based on Assessable Income and number of properties owned.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible Singapore citizens can receive up to $2,250 of cash payout over 5 years from 2022 to 2026
Payout will be disbursed in December each year
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Cash payouts of $700 to $2,250 in December over 5 years from 2022 to 2026.

Who is this for?

For AP Cash Payout in 2026 

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore; and

21 years old and above in 2027

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Contact us

Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
